guide.title: User Guide
guide.subtitle: MyAgent System Manual
guide.step1: Go to "Capabilities" page and check Agent permission toggles (recommend conservative for first time)
guide.step2: (Optional) Go to "Settings → Prompt Config" to edit Agent identity prompt
guide.step3: Go to "Survival Engine" page and click Start
guide.step4: Monitor Agent heartbeat status and output on the "Dashboard"
guide.step5: Approve Agent-created automation workflows on the "Workflows" page
guide.architectureDesc1: MyAgent is an AI control plane. The core idea is to let the AI Agent run autonomously and proactively report.
guide.architectureDesc2: Self-Report API — Agent proactively reports work status via 8 API endpoints: heartbeat, deliverable, discovery, workflow, upgrade, review, workflow run.
guide.architectureDesc3: Survival Engine — Continuously runs Claude in tmux with auto-restart, context recovery, and periodic Feishu reports. Agent recovers with recent heartbeat and review data after crashes.
guide.architectureDesc4: Skill Library — Agent auto-creates workflows when reusable processes are discovered (SOP + code references), and autonomously decides whether to execute based on historical success rate and revenue.
guide.apiAuthNote: All POST endpoints require Header: Authorization: Bearer $MYAGENT_TOKEN
guide.pageDashboardDesc1: System overview: Shows Agent's latest heartbeat, today's output count, pending upgrade requests, and other key metrics.
guide.pageDashboardDesc2: Start/stop Survival Engine, view active session count, scheduler status.
guide.pageChatDesc1: Interactive conversation with Claude via embedded tmux terminal.
guide.pageChatDesc2: Suitable for ad-hoc questions, code debugging, quick tasks.
guide.pageChatDesc3: Chat history is managed by Claude itself; the system auto-scans JSONL session files.
guide.pageSurvivalDesc1: Core feature: A continuously running autonomous AI agent working non-stop in tmux.
guide.pageSurvivalDesc2: After starting, the Agent auto-reads the Identity Prompt, project list, skill library, then makes autonomous decisions and executes.
guide.pageSurvivalDesc3: Agent proactively reports heartbeat, output, discoveries, workflows etc. via Self-Report API.
guide.pageSurvivalDesc4: If the Agent process exits unexpectedly, the engine auto-restarts with --resume.
guide.pageSurvivalDesc5: Adjust Agent behavior parameters (autonomy, risk tolerance, etc.) on the "Capabilities" page.
guide.pageSurvivalDesc6: Edit the Agent's identity prompt on the "Prompt Config" page.
guide.pageOutputDesc1: Shows Agent's self-reported deliverables (code, research, articles, scripts, tools, etc.).
guide.pageOutputDesc2: Each output includes status (draft/ready/published/pushed), linked repo, value estimate.
guide.pageOutputDesc3: Also shows Agent's discoveries (opportunities, risks, insights, etc.), sorted by priority.
guide.pageWorkflowsDesc1: Agent's reusable automation flow library, similar to a local n8n.
guide.pageWorkflowsDesc2: When Agent discovers money-making processes, it auto-creates workflows (with step SOPs, script paths, API calls, etc.).
guide.pageWorkflowsDesc3: Each workflow records execution history: success rate, revenue, time spent.
guide.pageWorkflowsDesc4: Agent reads the skill library on startup and autonomously decides whether to execute based on historical data.
guide.pageWorkflowsDesc5: You can enable/disable workflows; disabled workflows show as "pending approval".
guide.pageWorkflowsDesc6: Workflow categories: Content Creation, Marketing, Development, Research, Automation.
guide.pageCapabilitiesDesc1: Capability toggles: Control what Agent can do (browser access, code execution, Git push, spending money, etc.).
guide.pageCapabilitiesDesc2: Behavior settings: Control how Agent works (autonomy level, report frequency, risk tolerance, work pace).
guide.pageCapabilitiesDesc3: Settings take effect in real-time; Agent applies them on next Identity Prompt read.
guide.pageSessionsDesc1: All Claude Code sessions detected by the system (via JSONL files and process detection).
guide.pageSessionsDesc2: View each session's working directory, status (active/idle/finished), last activity time.
guide.pageSessionsDesc3: Click a session to view detailed message history.
guide.pageTasksDesc1: Task scheduling queue: manually create tasks or auto-generated by the system.
guide.pageTasksDesc2: Tasks sorted by priority; the scheduler auto-assigns to idle sessions.
guide.pageMemoryDesc1: Search Agent's persistent memory (from MyAgent database and claude-mem).
guide.pageMemoryDesc2: Memory types: observation records, session summaries, factual memories.
guide.pageMemoryDesc3: Supports semantic search and keyword search.
